name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized receipts cause delayed payments. We automate receipt categorization and report submission instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Difficulty in categorizing and coding receipts for expense reports.
